name: io.github.thriftell/budgetary
title: Budgetary: estimate token spend
description: Pre-flight, probabilistic token-spend estimate (range, scenario, confidence) for a coding task.

environmentVariables.name: BUDGETARY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Budgetary API key (bg_live_ or bg_test_ prefix). Get one at https://budgetary.tools.
